allow: Bash(git -C /Users/son/Desktop/dev/rafiki add CLAUDE.md ARCHITECTURE.md CONTRIBUTING.md config/CLAUDE.md rafiki/CLAUDE.md rafiki/users/CLAUDE.md rafiki/static/CLAUDE.md rafiki/templates/CLAUDE.md compose/CLAUDE.md webpack/CLAUDE.md docs/CLAUDE.md locale/CLAUDE.md .github/CLAUDE.md .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.md .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/feature_request.md)

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.py ]] && uvx ruff check --fix --quiet "$f" && uvx ruff format --quiet "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.html ]] && uvx djlint "$f" --reformat --quiet; } 2>/dev/null || true
